meta.title: BraidedByMae — African Hair Braiding in Nuremberg
meta.description: African hair braiding specialist in Nuremberg, Fürth, Erlangen and Bamberg. Book your appointment now.

hero.headline:
Your hair,
our passion
hero.subtitle: Custom African braiding in Nuremberg and surrounding areas

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Custom creations to enhance your hair

boxBraids.name: Box Braids
boxBraids.description: Classic individual braids available in various sizes and lengths. An elegant protective style that lasts 4 to 8 weeks.

cornrows.name: Cornrows
cornrows.description: Braids woven flat against the scalp in straight or artistic patterns. Perfect for a clean, structured everyday look.

twists.name: Twists
twists.description: Two-strand twists for a natural, voluminous finish. Ideal for protecting your hair while staying stylish.

locs.name: Locs
locs.description: Installation and maintenance of temporary or permanent locs. A timeless style that showcases your personality.

crochet.name: Crochet Braids
crochet.description: Quick technique using pre-curled extensions attached by crochet hook. Natural, voluminous results in record time.

men.name: Men's Braids
men.description: Cornrows, twists and modern styles tailored for men. Clean, trendy cuts to define your personal style.

booking.title: Book an Appointment
booking.subtitle: Choose your service and time slot

success.title: Request sent!
success.message: Mae will contact you within 24 hours to confirm your appointment.

review1.name: Aminata D.
review1.comment: Mae is a true artist! My box braids are perfect, exactly what I wanted. She takes the time to listen and the result is always stunning.

review2.name: Fatou S.
review2.comment: Great experience from start to finish. Mae is punctual, professional and so talented. I recommend her 100%!

review3.name: Chloé M.
review3.comment: First time getting African braids and Mae made me feel so comfortable. The result is incredible, I've received so many compliments!

about.title: About Mae
about.story: Passionate about the art of African braiding since childhood, I turned this passion into my profession. Each hairstyle is a unique creation, crafted with love and care. My goal: for you to leave not only with a gorgeous hairstyle, but also with the smile and confidence that comes with it.
about.homeService: Home service available (surcharge of €10–20 depending on distance)
about.availability: Available primarily on weekends, flexible on request

contact.title: Contact
contact.ctaSubtext: Book your session now and let Mae create your next look.
